category_sources: Official GitHub repository is the project homepage in source_facts.homepage.
source_facts.description says it converts ELF files to UF2 for USB flashing bootloaders.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official elf2uf2-rs repository.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface.
docs.rs hosts Rust crate documentation/source for elf2uf2-rs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/JoNil/elf2uf2-rs; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies ELF to UF2 conversion for USB flashing bootloaders.
source_facts.name suffix and docs.rs source indicate a Rust project.
